name: X-Golf Hermitage
about: X-Golf Hermitage offers a modern indoor golf experience using state-of-the-art simulators that combine camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software for unparalleled accuracy. The venue provides a full-service bar and restaurant, making it suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings. Pricing is structured per simulator hour, accommodating groups of up to six players, with rates varying by day and time of booking.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from the simulator technology
Flexible pricing per hour, accommodating up to 6 people per simulator
Full-service bar and food offerings for a complete entertainment experience
Private rooms available for events and parties
PGA-certified lessons available for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Light bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available
Full-service bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available, but players are encouraged to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue offers a full-service bar and kitchen with light bites and appetizers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. For multiple players, an additional hour may be needed per player.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and the venue offers leagues and events suitable for juniors and youth.
